subject: introduction meeting : rac london quants and houston research

emails.subject: Re: Introduction meeting : RAC London Quants and Houston Research
emails.subject_base: Introduction meeting : RAC London Quants and Houston Research
emails.body: Re: Introduction meeting RAC London Quants and Houston Research Rodrigo, We shall be very glad to meet you. If you can dedicate one day to meeting the members of the Research Group I could arrange a series of meetings with different units. What about Sep the 11th or Sep the 12th (Monday or Tuesday)? If you are free one evening we can have dinner together. Vince Rodrigo Lamas 08/24/2000 11:01 AM

emails.subject: Re: Introduction meeting : RAC London Quants and Houston Research
emails.subject_base: Introduction meeting : RAC London Quants and Houston Research
emails.body: Rodrigo, I think it is Churrasco's, A South American restaurant. I shall make reservations for the 12th. I shall also arrange the meetings on Tuesday with different units of the Research group. Vince Rodrigo Lamas 08/24/2000 01:59 PM

emails.subject_base: Introduction meeting : RAC London Quants and Houston Research
emails.body: Hi Vince, Thanks for organizing the meetings,and a special thanks for organizing the reservations for the dinner. I am looking forward the visit to Houston. Rodrigo Vince J Kaminski 24/08/2000 20:25
